title: Pan-Seared Fish with Croatia-Style Pilaf
description: A simple yet flavorful dish that combines pan-seared fish with a traditional Croatia-style pilaf.

ingredients.name: Garlicky pilaf
ingredients.notes: Recipe using roasted garlicky Croatian rice

instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Season the fish with salt and pepper.
Add the fish to the pan and sear for 3-4 minutes on each side.
Transfer the fish to a plate and set aside.
Add the cooked pilaf to the pan and stir to combine with any remaining oil.
Squeeze lemon juice over the pilaf and stir to combine.
Serve the fish with the pilaf and garnish with additional lemon wedges if desired.
